title: Camp scale
_note: Size of the camp; low tiers commonest. Each carries the visible 'signs' (defenses scale with size) and a number-appearing dice, rolled to a concrete head-count when the camp is manned. Composed in js/gen/feature-detail.js.

value.signs: a few tents and a picket line
rows of tents, drying racks, a gibbet
ringed by a ditch and a timber palisade
